category_sources: source_facts.description: Extract subdomains from SSL certificates; official GSAN site says it extracts Subject Alternative Names from SSL certificates on HTTPS servers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation title is GSAN - Get Subject Alternative Names; source_facts.name is gsan.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site provides installation and usage documentation; official GitHub README mirrors that documentation.
repo_sources: Official GSAN homepage links to 'View the Project on GitHub franccesco/getaltname'; GitHub repository README confirms the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GSAN documentation describe extracting SAN DNS names/subdomains directly from HTTPS certificates.
